description: You are a technical writer managing an open-source documentation site. Fix the five bugs in the Node.js documentation builder at /home/ga/workspace/docs_builder/ so that 'npm run build' generates perfectly formatted HTML for the entire markdown corpus. The bugs to resolve are: random file dropping, content loss after horizontal rules, incorrect parsing of multiple wiki-links on a single line, false dead link reports for files with spaces, and broken relative paths for nested assets.
